callbacks.name: Backend Notify
callbacks.trigger: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction is completed, TapPay automatically sends a backend notification to the URL specified in backend_notify_url in the request.
callbacks.transport: HTTP POST to backend_notify_url; Content-Type: application/json; URL must start with https and only supports port 443
callbacks.verification: Frontend redirect could be faked; TapPay recommends implementing backend notify. If backend notify fails, use the Record API (use rec_trade_id as the search criteria) to verify the latest transaction result.
callbacks.expected_response: Merchant must respond HTTP 200. If TapPay does not receive a successful Backend Notify (not HTTP 200), it resends every 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 minutes, up to five times at most; if all fail, a notification letter is sent to the contact person's and technical email mailbox.

callbacks.name: Frontend Redirect
callbacks.trigger: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction is completed, TapPay redirects the user to the URL specified in frontend_redirect_url in the request.
callbacks.transport: Web redirection (GET) to frontend_redirect_url with four query-string parameters (rec_trade_id, order_number, bank_transaction_id, status); Request Header Content-Type: html/text
callbacks.verification: Frontend redirect could be faked; TapPay suggests implementing backend notify. After receiving the frontend redirect URL and before displaying the transaction result page, call the Record API (use rec_trade_id as the search criteria) to check the latest transaction result.

field_conditions.scope: Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API
field_conditions.rule: result_url (containing frontend_redirect_url and backend_notify_url) is required.
field_conditions.when: three_domain_secure = true (Direct Pay 3D) or e-payment transaction
field_conditions.source: Pay by Prime / Pay by Card Token request tables, result_url row; flow note

field_conditions.scope: Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API / all transaction requests
field_conditions.rule: merchant_group_id cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.
card_ccv cannot be used together with ccv_prime.

field_conditions.scope: Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API

field_conditions.rule: bank_member_id is required for binding transaction on e-payments (only supported by some e-payments).

To perform two-step identity authentication (KYC), kyc_verification_merchant_id must contain the Merchant ID from the KYC verification merchant settings. If a field is marked true, the corresponding cardholder field is sent to the acquirer for KYC.
field_conditions.when: transaction requires identity authentication (KYC); two-step KYC

test_cases.name: Pay by Card Token API request

missing.detail: No request signing or payload encryption mechanism is documented. Authentication is via the x-api-key header (partner_key); requests/responses are plain JSON.
additional_data states 'Data will be encrypted and decrypted when other customization requirements' but no algorithm, mode, padding, key/IV, or steps are specified.
The source does not state what HTTP response the merchant must return for the Frontend Redirect (browser redirect to the merchant page).
No cryptographic signature/verification is provided for Backend Notify or Frontend Redirect. Verification is only via re-querying the Record API with rec_trade_id.
